BUG FOUND & FIXED (session 2): All solitairestack.com game variant pages (pyramid, golf, tripeaks, etc.) had doubled JSON-LD schemas in the rendered DOM — raw HTML had 6 schemas, DOM showed 12. Root cause: React 18 hydration does not reconcile <script dangerouslySetInnerHTML> elements, re-inserting them during client-side hydration. Fix: added stable id= attribute to every ld+json script tag across 22 files. JsonLd.tsx auto-generates id from @type+name slug.

Competitor advantage: online-solitaire.com word count on FreeCell is ~689 words. Our FreeCell homepage has ~1350 words and solitairestack.com/pyramid has ~1911 words. We maintain significant content depth advantage.
